snippet.title: Todd Chrisley speaks from prison: Exclusive interview | Entin Across America
snippet.description:
Todd Chrisley, who gained fame on the show “Chrisley Knows Best” before being convicted on charges of bank fraud, spoke out publicly for the first time from behind bars. 

The jailed TV star spoke exclusively with NewsNation’s Brian Entin, saying he believes he’s being targeted by prison staff and that he and other inmates are living in filthy conditions.

In this podcast, Entin dives deeper into the allegations, sharing a response from the prison system and an extended interview with Chrisley’s daughter, Savannah Chrisley. 

#ToddChrisley #ChrisleyKnowsBest #SavannahChrisley
